content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

May 3, 2005

David Roberti
ROBERTI JENSEN LLP
Attorneys At Law
3800 Wilshire Boulevard, Suite 714
Los Angeles, CA 90010-2602

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-076

Dear Senator Roberti:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of April 20, 2005, you have withdrawn your request for advice. If you have any questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Carla Wardlow
Division Chief
Technical Assistance Division

CW:rd
I:\AdviceLetrs\05-076

embedding.qa_text: The letter is from the Fair Political Practices Commission (FPPC) to David Roberti of ROBERTI JENSEN LLP, Attorneys At Law. The FPPC informs Roberti that he has withdrawn his request for advice and provides contact information for further questions. The letter is signed by Carla Wardlow, Division Chief of the Technical Assistance Division, and dated May 3, 2005. --- FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION 428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329 (916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886 May 3, 2005 David Roberti ROBERTI JENSEN LLP Attorneys At Law 3800 Wilshire Boulevard, Suite 714 Los Angeles, CA 90010-2602 Re: Your Request for Advice Our File No. W-05-076 Dear Senator Roberti: Pursuant to our telephone conversation of April 20, 2005, you have withdrawn your request for advice. If you have any questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660. Sincerely, Luisa Menchaca General Counsel [Signature] Carla Wardlow By: Carla Wardlow Division Chief Technical Assistance Division CW:rd I:\AdviceLtrs\05-076
